channel.title: Ens on 刘彤 - AI 产品经理
channel.description: Recent content in Ens on 刘彤 - AI 产品经理

item.title: About
item.description:
About Me

AI Product Manager · Results-Driven · Practical

Master’s graduate with 8 months of hands-on AI product experience in the real estate vertical, specializing in LLM application layer product development. Proficient in no-code AI platform workflow design, agent decomposition, and multi-dimensional user profiling and memory systems.

Strengths

  • Practical AI Product — Real business deployment experience with understanding of LLM pain points
  • Advanced Architecture Vision — Complete progression from traditional workflows to modular Agent architectures
  • Business Results Oriented — Quantifiable business conversion improvements
  • Fast Learner — Quickly mastered the complete intelligent agent specification system

item.title: Agent Memory System & Multi-Dimensional Profiling
item.description: Designed a 4-dimensional profiling system with data governance rules to power personalized agent memory

item.title: Business AI Tools & Customer Service Iteration
item.description: Built AI Skills on low-code platform and optimized customer service dialogue for improved lead conversion

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Contact

Thank you for your interest! Feel free to reach out:

  • Email: your-email@example.com
  • GitHub: tonton-520

item.title: Next-Gen AI Customer Service Agent Design
item.description: Designed a new LLM-powered Agent customer service system from scratch to replace legacy DI workflows
